description: Lokotech Group AS, a management and holding company, builds intergrade blockchain mining infrastructure and computing hardware. The company is involved in ASIC mining hardware through its Hashblade platform and data center operations, as well as in the provision of mining pool and blockchain services, and artificial intelligence and computing services. The company was formerly known as Harmonychain AS and changed its name to Lokotech Group AS in October 2023. Lokotech Group AS was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Oslo, Norway.
